processing.text:
if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'UnitConversion', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int
-- Check --alter table @@table alter column ma_vt char(32) --create index i on @@table (ma_bp)
if @type = '0' delete @@table where rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) + rtrim(ltrim(dvt)) in (select rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) + rtrim(ltrim(dvt)) from dmqddvt)
select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt <> '' and ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt where nhieu_dvt=1)&Error; select @field = 'dvt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where dvt <> '' and dvt not in (select dvt from dmdvt)&Error;
select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmqddvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.dvt = b.dvt delete @@table where rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) + rtrim(ltrim(dvt)) in (select rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) + rtrim(ltrim(dvt)) from #k) --
-- Insert select @q = 'insert into dmqddvt(ma_vt, dvt, he_so, xtype,status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ' select @q = @q + ' ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select ma_vt, dvt, max(he_so), ''U'', ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', ' select @q = @q + ' 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table group by ma_vt, dvt' exec sp_executesql @q
if @type = '1' begin update dmqddvt set he_so = b.he_so, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmqddvt a, #k b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.dvt = b.dvt end
